top_signals.title: Stocks, Bonds Fall as Rally in Oil Fuels Fed Angst: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A standoff between the US and Iran lifted oil prices, dragging down stocks and bonds after clashes over the Strait of Hormuz raised concerns about a disruption in energy supplies that could fuel inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US appeals court revives lawsuits linking painkiller Tylenol to autism
top_signals.summary: Federal panel in New York finds trial judge wrongly excluded expert testimony in dismissing litigation
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Shell sells Indian wind and solar business for $1.8bn
top_signals.summary: Aditya Birla Renewables takes on Shell’s renewable assets in India as energy major continues to refocus on oil and gas
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with Small Business Bank and announces termination enforcement actions with BNP Paribas S.A., BNP Paribas USA, Inc., BNP Paribas Securities Corp., and Community Bankshares, Inc.
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with Small Business Bank and announces termination enforcement actions with BNP Paribas S.A., BNP Paribas USA, Inc., BNP Paribas Securities Corp., and Community Bankshares, Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Hyundai completes USDT treasury settlement pilot between US and Mexico
top_signals.summary: Hyundai completed a proof-of-concept using Tether's USDT to settle a cross-border treasury transfer between its US and Mexican subsidiaries, highlighting growing enterprise interest in stablecoin-based payments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Traders are betting on a comeback quarter for Netflix
top_signals.summary: Options traders are striking a decidedly bullish tone heading into the streaming giant's earnings on Thursday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Hungary’s MPs oust president in purge of Orbán loyalists
top_signals.summary: Prime Minister Péter Magyar calls Tamás Sulyok a ‘puppet’ of illiberal former leader in his speech to parliament before vote
